【提示】本平台是纯净沟通平台，所有用户应遵守法律法规，不得利用本平台从事违法活动。

[Notice] This platform is a clean communication space. All users must comply with applicable laws and must not use this platform for any illegal activities.

• 煽动、宣扬暴力、恐怖活动的内容
• Inciting or promoting violence, terrorism, or any violent acts

• 涉毒、涉赌、涉黄等违法内容
• Content related to illegal drugs, gambling, or pornography

• 侵犯他人隐私、名誉权的内容
• Content that invades others' privacy or defames individuals

• 散布虚假信息、谣言的内容
• Spreading false information or rumors

• 任何形式的骚扰、歧视、仇恨言论
• Any form of harassment, discrimination, or hate speech

• 侵犯知识产权的内容
• Content that infringes intellectual property rights

• 政治敏感、危害国家安全的内容
• Politically sensitive content or content that endangers national security

违反以上规则的用户，平台有权封禁其身份密钥。感谢您的配合！

Users who violate the above rules may have their identity keys banned. Thank you for your cooperation!

@某人 会在对方客户端弹出通知。在频道里 @SibyX-AI 可以向官方机器人提问。

Mentioning @someone will trigger a notification on their device. In a channel, type @SibyX-AI to ask the official bot a question.
